title: alchemilla vulgaris proles obtusa
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris proles obtusa, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a perennial herb native to Europe, used in traditional medicine and herbalism. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for soothing wounds, reducing swelling, and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Lady's Mantle include reducing menstrual cramps and heavy bleeding, as well as alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. Herbal preparations of Lady's Mantle include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support reproductive health and provide relief from various gynecological issues.
